params.text: 61F with HTN (I10), CHF (I50.9), and long-term medication use (Z79.899) admitted for inpatient management. Vitals: BP 136/76, HR 76, SpO2 96%. Labs: creatinine 1.1; troponin PENDING at time of documentation - result not yet available and must be followed up prior to or immediately after discharge. Readmission risk assessment: ELEVATED given CHF diagnosis, age, polypharmacy, and pending cardiac biomarker. Plan: ensure troponin result reviewed, arrange early outpatient follow-up, medication reconciliation, and CHF self-management education.

params.plan_text: Discharge planning for 61F with CHF (I50.9), HTN (I10), on chronic medications (Z79.899). READMISSION RISK: ELEVATED. PENDING RESULT: troponin pending at time of plan - must be reviewed and acted upon prior to or immediately after discharge; do not finalize discharge without troponin resulted and reviewed. Follow-up: cardiology/PCP appointment within 7 days of discharge. Medication reconciliation completed with patient. CHF education: daily weights, low-sodium diet, symptom recognition (weight gain >2 lb/day or >5 lb/week, worsening dyspnea, edema) - return precautions reviewed. Home health referral considered. Patient/family verbalized understanding.
